text:
Toraemon (トラエモン, Toraemon) is a card found in the Greed Island game. It is one of the game's 100 designated slot cards and is required for a player to complete the game. This endangered creature is best known for storing things in its 4-D pocket.

Summary

Toraemon (トラエモン, Toraemon): This card allows the user to summon forth a Toraemon, a rare, near-extinct creature. It often picks up random objects and stuffs them into its 4-D pocket.

Card Description

{| border="0" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE"
![Jap]
|No.022 - トラエモン 
絶滅寸前の猛獣。腹の袋にモノをつめ込む習性があり、超貴重なアイテムが複数入っているケースも少なくない。 
|-
![Eng]
|No.022 - Toraemon 
An endangered species. It has the trait of stuffing things in its belly pocket. Multiple Ultra-Valuable items could be found inside.
|}

Trivia

The name and appearance are a reference to Doraemon. Some of the objects that can be obtained through the cards are also reminiscent of the gadgets given by the afore-mentioned character.
Both Shalnark and Gon contemplated using this card to leave the island with several items; however, Killua believed this strategy would have failed, either because only the three cards selected by the winner can be utilized outside of the island, or difficult to let a wild Toraemon timely accurate pick-up their cards and then capture it.
